meta.title: Dr. Jorge Arce — Oral & Maxillofacial Surgery, South Bay CA
meta.description: Board-certified implantology and oral surgery in Redondo Beach & Torrance. Twenty-seven years restoring function and rebuilding smiles. By appointment.

sections.sub: Restoring function and rebuilding smiles for twenty-seven years — dental implants, reconstruction, and the complex cases other clinicians refer out.

cards.title: I'm missing one or more teeth
cards.text: From a single implant to full-arch All-On-X, we rebuild what was lost — function first, so you can eat, smile, and speak with confidence.

cards.title: My dentist referred me
cards.text: You're in the right hands. We handle the extractions, pathology, and surgical cases general practices refer out — and report back every step.

cards.title: I want a second opinion
cards.text: Facing a complex decision? Bring your case. You'll leave with an honest, unhurried assessment of every option — including doing nothing.

sections.title: Six disciplines. One standard.
sections.lede: Every case at the practice — routine or referred — is held to the same surgical standard, built over twenty-seven years in the South Bay.

sections.title: Twenty-seven years of board-certified practice in the South Bay.

items.title: Dental Implants & All-On-X
items.tagline: For missing teeth — from one implant to a full arch.
items.text: Titanium implants placed with surgical precision, from a single tooth to full-arch All-On-X reconstruction. We plan every case on your anatomy, walk you through each step, and stay with you through healing and beyond.

items.title: Reconstruction
items.tagline: When bone and tissue have been lost — we rebuild.
items.text: Grafting and reconstructive surgery that restores the foundation before the smile: bone, tissue, and bite. The cases that look impossible are often the ones with the most to gain — bring yours and let's look together.

items.title: Complex Extractions & Referrals
items.tagline: The cases general practices refer out — handled here.
items.text: Impacted teeth, surgical extractions, and pathology, managed with the calm of twenty-seven years of doing exactly this. Referring dentists receive a full report at every stage — your patient comes back to you, grateful.

sections.title: Function first. Beauty follows.
sections.text:
I came to surgery the long way — trained in Colombia, licensed again from zero in California, and settled in the South Bay, where I opened this practice in 2007. Every step taught me the same lesson: shortcuts show up later, in someone's mouth.

Today my work is simple to describe and demanding to do: restore what was lost, protect what remains, and tell every patient the truth about both. That standard doesn't bend — not for difficulty, and not for convenience.

lead.quote: I had been told by two surgeons it was impossible. Dr. Arce took the time no one else did. I can eat, smile, and speak again.
lead.who: Full-arch reconstruction patient — concept story, shared with permission

items.quote: When a case is beyond what I can handle, Jorge is the first call I make. My patients always come back grateful — and so do I.
items.who: Dr. David Kim, D.D.S. — Referring Dentist, Torrance

items.quote: The most thorough and honest surgeon I have ever met. He treated my father like family.
Calm, precise, and genuinely kind. He explained every step until I understood. The result speaks for itself.
